Name: Aiglon College
Tagline: Aiglon College is a private, non-profit international boarding school in Switzerland offering a distinctive, world-class education in a stunning alpine setting.
About: When John Corlette founded Aiglon in 1949 he set into motion an evolving educational community that is more than simply a Swiss boarding school. Drawing from foundational principles as a basis of approach, at Aiglon we understand that through the balanced development of mind, body, and spirit our community sets out together upon a journey that has the power to engage and enrich us.
Philosophy: At Aiglon, education is not just about what you learn—it’s about who you become. Perched high in the Swiss Alps, we offer a rare opportunity to grow in mind, body, and spirit within a global community that dares to embrace challenge, creativity, and compassion.
Outcomes: Aiglon College graduates consistently secure placements at top universities worldwide, including Ivy League schools. Alumni are known for their leadership roles and contributions in diverse fields globally.
Admissions: In 1949, John Corlette founded Aiglon College on the ethos of balanced mind, body, and spirit development. This philosophy continues to guide our school and shapes everything we do.
Quote: Meditation and mountain expeditions have resided at the core of Aiglon life since the school's inception. They are driving aspects of our daily activities and rooted in our guiding principles.

Performance.Facilities & Resources: Sixteen students, aged 14 to 18, are at the heart of the CubeSat project, which began in January 2024. From ideation, to design, prototyping, project management and marketing, this is a 100% student-led project.
Performance.Coaching Credentials: Aiglon College's faculty includes internationally certified teachers with specialisms in the British Curriculum, many holding advanced degrees and extensive experience in international education. The diverse staff, hailing from over 30 countries, enriches the learning environment.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: Aiglon College prioritizes student wellbeing through a comprehensive pastoral care system, including dedicated house parents and professional counselling services. The supportive boarding environment fosters a sense of community and personal growth in the Swiss Alps.
Performance.Academic Integration: Aiglon College offers a rigorous curriculum featuring IGCSE and IB programmes, emphasizing critical thinking and global awareness. Students benefit from small class sizes and innovative teaching methods tailored to individual learning styles.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Graduates of Aiglon College achieve impressive university placements, with many attending Ivy League and top global institutions. The school's robust academic preparation results in consistently high exam scores and successful career pathways.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Aiglon College ensures academic excellence through regular progress reports and biannual parent-teacher meetings. The school maintains IB accreditation, emphasizing continuous improvement and personalized student advisory support.
